hero.heading:
Always Ready
To Serve You
hero.subheading: Jan Seva Portal — a dedicated digital platform for unity and progress of Indian communities. Access all government services, community news, and event information in one place.

announcements.heading: Latest Announcements
announcements.subheading: Important notices and news for the community

items.title: Special Gram Sabha Meeting — 15 July 2026
items.description: All villagers are informed that a special Gram Sabha meeting will be held on 15 July at 10 AM at the Gram Panchayat Bhawan.

items.title: Applications Open for New Water Connections
items.description: Applications for new domestic water connections in the Gram Panchayat have begun. Interested families can apply until 31 July.

items.title: Cleanliness Drive — 20 July 2026
items.description: A special cleanliness drive will be organized by the Gram Panchayat. Cooperation from all citizens is expected.

items.title: PM Awas Yojana — List of Eligible Beneficiaries
items.description: The list of eligible beneficiaries under PM Awas Yojana is available at the Gram Panchayat office.

services.heading: Our Services
services.subheading: Simple, fast, and transparent — all government services at your fingertips

items.title: Birth Certificate
items.description: Apply online for a birth certificate and receive it at home.

items.title: Death Certificate
items.description: Easy online application process for death certificates.

items.title: Residence Certificate
items.description: Get your residence certificate quickly and easily.

items.title: Marriage Certificate
items.description: Online application and registration for marriage certificates.

items.title: Land Records
items.description: View your land details, maps, and rights records.

items.title: Grievance Redressal
items.description: Register your problem or complaint online and get resolution.

about.heading:
Serving the Community,
Our Commitment
description: Jan Seva Portal is a dedicated digital service platform for rural and semi-urban communities of India. Our aim is to make government services simple, transparent, and accessible for every citizen.
We are founded on three core values: Unity, Service, and Progress. Our team works day and night for the betterment of the community, ensuring every family receives proper services and information.

items.title: Annual Village Festival 2026
items.description: Our village's annual festival — cultural programs, sports competitions, and prize distribution.

items.title: Free Health Camp
items.description: Free health check-up, medicines, and specialist consultation for all citizens.

items.title: Youth Sports Competition
items.description: Cricket, Kabaddi, and wrestling competitions for youth aged 15–25.
